name: volundr
description: Lightweight web harness for Pi coding agent

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @volundr/server & npm run dev --workspace @volundr/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @volundr/web && npm run build --workspace @volundr/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @volundr/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @volundr/web
